_memory_path_help: Leave memory_path empty to use the default (Documents/My Games/Fallout4/F4AI/NPC_Memories). Set it to any folder on any drive if your C: drive is full. Example: H:/F4AI_Memory  or  D:/Games/FO4_AI_Memory
_tts_help: TTS (text-to-speech) plays AI responses through the NPC in-game. Requires a Sound Descriptor in your ESP pointing to tts_voice_path. Set enable_tts to 1 after completing CK setup. Engines: edge-tts (needs internet + pip install edge-tts pydub) or pyttsx3 (offline + pip install pyttsx3).
